_note: THE HOUSE OF JACOB — the seventy who went down to Egypt (Genesis 46:8-27), c.1770-1700 BC. Builds the grandsons and great-grandsons of Israel named in Genesis 46, cross-checked against the clan lists of Numbers 26 and 1 Chronicles. Each family APPENDS to an existing father from 07d_jacob12.json. Unnamed wives follow this dataset's '—' placeholder convention (cf. PEREZW, LEVIWIFE, KOHATHW). Namespaced ids avoid collisions: Reuben's sons Hezron and Carmi -> HEZRON_REU / CARMI_REU (vs Judah's grandson HEZRON); Zebulun's son Elon -> ELON_ZEB (vs Elon the Hittite). ALREADY BUILT, not repeated here: Joseph's sons Manasseh (MANASSEHJ) & Ephraim under JOSEPHJ+ASENATH; Levi's son Kohath (KOHATH) with Amram (AMRAM); Judah's sons Er/Onan/Shelah (SHELAHJ) by the Canaanite Bath-shua (BATHSHUA) and Perez/Zerah (ZERAHJUDAH); Perez's son Hezron (HEZRON). Only Perez's second son Hamul and Levi's Gershon & Merari are added to those existing lines. The one new Canaanite mother the text flags is Shaul's (Genesis 46:10). Ordered so BERIAH exists before Heber & Malchiel reference it.
